exemplar.title: 22. What role do experts play in influencing our consumption or acquisition of knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: 22. What role do experts play in influencing our consumption or acquisition of knowledge?

strengths: Clearly selects three specific, real-world objects with well-established provenance and contextual details.
Explicitly links each object to the IA prompt by demonstrating how different experts (e.g., a foreign secretary, a radiologist, a public-health agency) shape public or personal knowledge.
Supports most points with appropriate evidence and source references, moving the discussion beyond mere description.
weaknesses: Analysis is uneven in depthâsome claims rest on unsupported assertions (e.g., labelling Terrie Hall an âexpertâ without defining criteria).
Repetition appears in justifications (overuse of âguidanceâ) and there is limited explicit comparison or contrast across the three objects.
Occasional incomplete sentences and formatting glitches disrupt the flow and obscure the line of reasoning in places.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets the descriptors for the 7-8 band by clearly identifying three specific objects with detailed real-world contexts and providing coherent, evidence-based explanations of how expert authority influences perception and behaviour. However, uneven analytical depth, repetition of key terms, occasional unsupported assertions and lapses in precision prevent the commentary from fully achieving the consistent clarity and sophistication required for a top-of-band (8) mark. A score of 7 reflects these strengths and limitations in alignment with the IB rubric.

annotations.comment: A final paragraph comparing how each objectâs expert influence differsâand any overarching similaritiesâwould enhance coherence.
Consider explicitly contrasting personal (ultrasound) versus public (speech, video) expert contexts to deepen comparative analysis.
The exhibition prompt is prominently and accurately restated, ensuring clarity of focus from the outset.
Restating the chosen TOK question immediately after the title helps anchor the readerâs understanding of the exhibitionâs focus.
Consider adding a brief introductory paragraph outlining how each of the three objects will individually and collectively illuminate the role of experts.
Refine the thesis to preview any intended cross-object comparison or contrast, strengthening coherence across the exhibition.
The provenance and source URL for Object 1 are clearly cited, establishing a strong real-world context.
The table excerpt is extensive and disrupts the flow of analysis; consider summarizing key quotations instead of embedding the full text.
The first commentary paragraph explicitly links Cookâs authority to shaping public perception, demonstrating relevance to the IA prompt.
The claim that Cookâs speech âdistorted public perceptionâ is asserted without supporting evidence; incorporate specific audience response data or critiques.
The sentence is incomplete and cuts off abruptly; please finish the thought to maintain coherence.
The discussion of cultural appropriation could be enriched by citing specific reactions or editorials from the Indian community at the time.
Selecting a personal medical ultrasound report offers a strong contrast to public-facing artefacts, illustrating diverse expert contexts.
To strengthen real-world context, include the date of the ultrasound and the setting (e.g., hospital, clinic).
The description of Dr. Y.Y.âs expertise and its influence on patient knowledge clearly aligns with the prompt.
The paragraph ends with a fragment (âproceedingâ); please complete the analysis to clarify the reportâs influence on subsequent actions.
Differentiate the type of guidance given by a medical expert from the more rhetorical guidance in Cookâs speech to deepen comparative insight.
The concluding link draws out how the report shapes decision-making, reinforcing the role of expert authority.
Repetition of âguidanceâ weakens the precision of justification; vary terminology and sharpen the objectâs unique contribution.
Provenance for Object 3 is precise, citing title, platform, and view count to ground the example in a specific real-world campaign.
Remove the math display glitch (<math display) and ensure all text fields are formatted consistently for readability.
Including view-count statistics strengthens justification, but reference specific studies or call-line data to support broader impact claims.
The final paragraph trails off mid-sentence; complete the claim about increased calls to quit-lines to maintain analytical clarity.
The concluding evidence in the final section solidifies how Terrie Hallâs testimony influenced measurable behaviour change.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
